dimensions.name: Ambiguity
dimensions.detects: Vague referents, undefined terms, phrasing with multiple plausible readings; fails the colleague test.
dimensions.severity_guidance: High: the core request has multiple materially different readings. Medium: secondary instructions are ambiguous. Low: minor vagueness unlikely to change the outcome.

dimensions.name: Missing context
dimensions.detects: Unstated audience, purpose, domain, or intent the reader must guess to respond well.
dimensions.severity_guidance: High: purpose/intent absent and the task is uninterpretable without it. Medium: context would clearly change the answer. Low: nice-to-have background missing.

dimensions.name: Contradictory instructions
dimensions.detects: Mutually exclusive requirements; inconsistent terminology for the same concept.
dimensions.severity_guidance: High: instructions directly conflict. Medium: tension requiring the model to prioritize silently. Low: inconsistent naming only.

dimensions.name: Scope creep
dimensions.detects: Requirements smuggled into asides; 'also / while you're at it' chains that expand the task implicitly.
dimensions.severity_guidance: High: the real scope is materially larger than the stated task. Medium: one or two implicit additions. Low: cosmetic asides.

dimensions.name: Multiple unrelated tasks
dimensions.detects: Independent goals bundled into one prompt that would each benefit from a dedicated request.
dimensions.severity_guidance: High: unrelated goals compete for the response. Medium: related but separable goals. Low: minor secondary ask.

dimensions.name: Poor formatting
dimensions.detects: Wall-of-text; data and instructions interleaved; long material placed after the question instead of before it.
dimensions.severity_guidance: High: structure actively obscures which text is instruction vs data. Medium: hard to parse but unambiguous. Low: cosmetic.

dimensions.name: Excessive complexity / over-prescription
dimensions.detects: Micromanaged step lists, redundant emphasis (ALL CAPS, 'CRITICAL'), nested conditionals a goal statement would replace.
dimensions.severity_guidance: High: prescription likely to degrade output on current models. Medium: noticeable over-specification. Low: mild redundancy.

dimensions.name: Weak objective
dimensions.detects: No definition of done; no statement of what a successful response contains.
dimensions.severity_guidance: High: success is unknowable from the prompt. Medium: implied but unstated. Low: stated loosely.

dimensions.name: Missing constraints
dimensions.detects: Length, tone, technology, format, or boundary requirements the user actually has but did not state.
dimensions.severity_guidance: High: unstated constraints will likely invalidate the response. Medium: rework probable. Low: preferences only.

dimensions.name: Missing output specification
dimensions.detects: No format, structure, or example of the expected answer.
dimensions.severity_guidance: High: output shape matters and is unspecified. Medium: partially specified. Low: format is genuinely flexible.
